rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MORTGAGE LENDER SERVICES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Depositing Surplus Proceeds; Setting Hearing On Distribution Of Surplus Proceeds; Directing The Clerk To Give Notice Of Hearing; And Discharging Petitioner Upon Deposit Of The Surplus Proceeds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 27, 2022 line 1. PETITIONER'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER DEPOSITING SURPLUS PROCEEDS; SETTING HEARING ON DISTRIBUTION OF SURPLUS PROCEEDS; DIRECTING THE CLERK TO GIVE NOTICE OF HEARING; AND DISCHARGING PETITIONER UPON DEPOSIT OF THE SURPLUS FUNDS is GRANTED. Surplus proceeds in the amount of $112,060.81 shall be deposited with the Court. Upon receipt of the funds, the Clerk of the Court shall set the pending claims for hearing. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SHIXUAN LIU VS. BAY BRIDGE INN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Case To Limited Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 27, 2022 line 2. DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO RECLASSIFY CASE TO LIMITED JURISDICTION Hearing Required. Plaintiff to present evidence of special damages and ability to recover $100,000 in general damages (e.g. factually similar cases where $100,000 in general damages awarded with the amount of special damages plaintiff can prove). Plaintiff's September 19, 2022 declaration is insufficient. Any materials/evidence that Plaintiff intends to present to the Court at the hearing shall be filed prior to 9:30 a.m. on October 27, 2022; served on the other side prior to 9:30 a.m. on October 27, 2022; hard copies delivered to department 501 before 9:00 a.m. on October 27, 2022. Plaintiff shall also address why late-filed opposition shall not be stricken. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: BIANCA SANCHEZ ET AL VS. 320 ALEMANY LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE Amended ANSWER to COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 27, 2022 line 4. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is DENIED. The matter sought to be stricken is not improper/not drawn in conformity with the law. The Court notes that this motion does not advance the litigation and does not narrow any of the issues in this case. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
